subcodes.first_line: O ye who have turned unto God! In this manifest Day, this praiseworthy Century, this Age of the Sovereign of existence, when the splendours of the Kingdom's bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبلان در این یوم مشهود و قرن محمود و عصر ملیک وجود که انوار فیوضات ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
